title: The Flaming Forties
writer: Bret Harte, Harvey Gates, Elliott J. Clawson
actors: Harry Carey, William Bailey, Jacqueline Gadsdon
plot: A young cowhand befriends a disreputable gambler and pulls him out of some trouble. Hoping to square things with his new friend, the gambler seeks to warn him about the cowhand's fiancée, about whom the gambler knows some unsavory...
